/usr/bin/clang++-18 -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/streamer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/streamer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/streamer.dir/dispatchqueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/streamer.dir/h264fileparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/streamer.dir/helpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/streamer.dir/opusfileparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/streamer.dir/fileparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/streamer.dir/stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/streamer.dir/ArgParser.cpp.o -o streamer  -Wl,-rpath,/home/light/work/Video_Prj/QT_Prj/datachannle_test_26_3_14/build/Desktop-Debug/third_party/libdatachannel ../../libdatachannel.so.0.24.1
